name: tabula-mcp
description: Create Tabula.md Markdown documents and open encrypted live rooms from Claude Desktop.
long_description: Tabula.md MCP is a local stdio MCP server and MCP App for drafting session-local Markdown documents in Claude Desktop and opening encrypted Tabula.md collaboration rooms. Local documents stay inside the MCP process. Room keys from invite URL fragments stay local, while the Tabula Room server receives only encrypted envelopes.

tools.name: tabula_create_document
tools.description: Create a local Tabula.md Markdown document and open the interactive MCP App editor.

tools.name: tabula_read_me
tools.description: Read Tabula.md MCP workflow guidance and security boundaries.

tools.name: tabula_share_document
tools.description: Export a local Tabula.md document as an encrypted room share link.

tools.name: tabula_connect_room
tools.description: Connect Claude Desktop to an encrypted Tabula.md room invite URL.

tools.name: tabula_read_markdown
tools.description: Read the current decrypted Markdown from a connected room.

tools.name: tabula_get_outline
tools.description: Extract Markdown headings from the connected room.

tools.name: tabula_room_status
tools.description: Inspect connection state, collaborators, hashes, and write mode.

tools.name: tabula_open_room_view
tools.description: Open a connected room inside the Tabula.md MCP App for status, outline, Markdown preview, refresh, fullscreen, and selection handoff.
